positive: Minimalist vector art design of a single stylized potted succulent plant in a geometric ceramic pot. Clean lines, flat design, negative space focus, limited color palette (terracotta, sage green, cream). Perfect for apparel or stationery. Scandinavian aesthetic, vector illustration, symmetry.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, gradients, photorealism
